WINDOW: 1183.267s to 1219.000s (smile at 1203.267s to 1204.000s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[1086.150-1198.870] interviewee: in Germany. And they helped me even with transportation and trucks and cars-- either way. And in a few days, I was already home. We marched 10 days. But maybe two,  three days I was home already.
[1198.870-1228.540] interviewee: The other colleagues who went to Russia-- there is not one alive. They all were killed in '40 in Katyn by the Russians because the Russians not only killed the military officers, but the whole Polish intelligentsia-- professors
